learnings.subject: Emergency Dematter Cream
learnings.learning: Dematter paid ROAS fell to RED (1.43 vs 2.07 breakeven) in the same window its 'detangler for dogs' organic rank slid 8->13 - possible pattern: rising paid spend masking organic decline; check organic rank before scaling Dematter paid.
evidence: Organic rank 'detangler for dogs' 8->13 (H10 Daily Keyword Tracker, 2026-07-08)
learnings.action_implication: Before any Dematter budget increase, verify organic ranks are stable; if organic is sliding, fix the listing before adding spend.

learnings.subject: Detangling Treatment / 4-in-1 Shampoo / Pin Brush
learnings.learning: Three low-spend SKUs ($3-$12/day) each spent with zero attributed sales on 2026-07-08 - sub-$15 daily budgets may be too small to exit the learning phase and convert; trickle spend produced $19.12 total loss with nothing learned.
evidence: Detangling $11.51 / Shampoo $3.00 / Pin Brush $4.61, all ROAS 0.00 (Supermetrics Query B, 2026-07-08)
learnings.action_implication: For these SKUs: either fund a campaign at a viable test budget with a defined kill threshold, or pause entirely - avoid indefinite trickle spend.

learnings.subject: Account tracking hygiene
learnings.learning: Three ASINs were spending in the ad account without existing in roas_bands.json - one at $166.90/day (2nd largest in account) - untracked spend can run unnoticed until the per-SKU pipeline works; every new campaign launch must add its ASIN to roas_bands.json the same day.
evidence: B0GT1H84JM $166.90 spend ROAS 1.41, unrecognized (Supermetrics Query B, 2026-07-08)
learnings.action_implication: Launch checklist rule for Angelo: campaign live -> ASIN added to roas_bands.json same day. JARVIS flags any unrecognized ASIN as RED automatically.
